description_long: This is a beaded necklace composed of large, spherical beads in a variety of colors and patterns, strung together in a symmetrical arrangement. The beads range from creamy yellows and browns to blues, whites, and a prominent red-and-black bead at the center, creating a visually striking focal point. The necklace is displayed on a white, curved jewelry bust, which accentuates the rounded form and color gradation of the beads. The beads appear to be made of either painted wood, ceramic, or resin, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The string holding the beads is dark and fine, likely made of nylon or silk, and the necklace closes at the back with a series of small, dark beads. The overall design is playful and eclectic, with a geometric motif and a moderate level of ornamentation.
description: A colorful beaded necklace with large, round beads in various hues and a central red-and-black accent bead, strung on a dark cord. The design is geometric and moderately ornate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with all beads visible, highlighting the central red-and-black bead and the symmetrical color arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizes the depth and roundness of the beads, with the color gradient from front to back more apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the closure area with small, dark beads and the back of the necklace, with the main beads less visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bead sequence and the transition from larger to smaller beads toward the back.
